phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il fiume Arno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel FYOO-meh AR-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici qui vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee kwee vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: No, solo nei bar o musei.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH SOH-loh NEH-ee BAHR OH moo-SEH-ee
likely_response.translation_en: No, only in bars or museums.

responses.english: No, only in bars or museums.
responses.phonetic: NOH SOH-loh NEH-ee BAHR OH moo-SEH-ee
responses.local: No, solo nei bar o musei.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora chiudono i negozi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah kay OR-ah KYOO-do-no ee neh-GO-tsee, per FA-vo-reh

likely_response.local: Solitamente chiudono alle otto di sera.
likely_response.pronunciation: soh-lee-tah-MEHN-teh kee-oo-DOH-noh AHL-leh OHT-toh DEE SEH-rah
likely_response.translation_en: Usually they close at eight in the evening.

responses.english: Usually they close at eight in the evening.
responses.phonetic: soh-lee-tah-MEHN-teh kee-oo-DOH-noh AHL-leh OHT-toh DEE SEH-rah
responses.local: Solitamente chiudono alle otto di sera.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un bancomat qui vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon BAHN-koh-mat kwee vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, at the corner of the street.

responses.english: Yes, at the corner of the street.
